pi_items.source: XML parsing of SampleDivesV2.ssrf downloaded from the official Subsurface Github repository master branch.
Task description and verifier.py source code logic.
setup_task.sh file path copy operation and verifier.py read path.

privileged_info_summary: The task's target file 'SampleDivesV2.ssrf' contains real dive data sourced from the official Subsurface GitHub repository. While the task description and metadata assert there are 8 dives, parsing the downloaded XML file confirms it actually contains 29 dives. This contradiction means the verifier will fail an agent that correctly cleans all dives without deleting any, as it explicitly checks for a total of 8 dives. The target state of exactly 1 cylinder per dive and the file path '/home/ga/Documents/dives.ssrf' are verified correct based on the task scripts and verifier logic.
